_doc: wq-048 + wq-055 — editorial overrides. When key is present and not expired, override.value wins over engine output. Provenance records both engine calc AND override reason. Set expiry dates to force re-review.

openai.2025.collected_revenue.reason: Conservative editorial position pending fuller H2 2025 data

openai.2025.vc_subsidy.reason: Hand-set to historical Sankey value pending re-calibration. Engine derives lower (~$4.34B) given OpenAI customer revenue revision. Editorial choice to keep VC node at $5.20B for narrative continuity until H2 2025 data lands.

2025.cost_structure.opex_estimation.size.reason: Tightening $1-5B band rate from 1.00 → 0.85 to bring Google engine output closer to hand-curated $2.50B without affecting Anthropic significantly.

2025.cost_structure.inference_estimation.reason: Raising Google's inference rate from 0.30 → 0.40 to bring engine output closer to hand-curated $2.50B.

anthropic.2025.collected_revenue.reason: Hand-curated via §7.2 weighted consensus across 3 independent sources (court affidavit + Sacra + The Information). Engine §2 method bottoms out at $2.92B due to fallback haircut even with 2024 ARR populated; full reconciliation to engine pending more H2 2025 data.
